title: Search for Board Rather than Scrolling - When creating an item from My Work calendar view.
excerpt:

posts.author: DylanBartlett (Dylan Bartlett)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I create an item by selecting a date on the My Work calendar view, I need to be able to start typing the board name to select it rather than scrolling through a list of all of my boards to find it manually.

I have hundreds of boards so I can never find the correct board that I would like to assign the new item to.

For instance if I click on Friday on the My Work calendar view, it gives me a pop up with a new item - which is perfect. But when I try to assign that new item to a specific board I have to scroll through hundreds of boards in no particular order to try to find “Job XYZ”.

If this can’t be done easily can we please sort the boards in the drop down menu alphabetically???
